_instructions: Copy this file, rename it to your-state-name.json (lowercase, hyphens), fill in the fields, and submit a PR. Set any field to null if you don't know it — accurate and incomplete is better than complete and wrong. Remove all _comment fields before submitting.
name: State Name

llc._comment: Information for forming an LLC in this state
llc._comment_filing_name: Some states call this 'Certificate of Formation' (Texas) or 'Certificate of Organization' (Massachusetts)
llc._comment_filing_fee: Filing fee in USD as a number, e.g. 200. Set null if unknown.
llc._comment_filing_link: Direct URL to the state's online filing system or form download
llc._comment_expedited: e.g. '24 hours for $50 extra' — set null if no expedited option
llc._comment_publication: IMPORTANT: Only New York and Arizona require newspaper publication. Set true if your state requires it.
llc._comment_pub_notes: If publication_requirement is true, describe the requirement, timeline, and estimated cost.

annual_report._comment_name: What your state calls it — e.g. 'Annual Report', 'Biennial Statement', 'Statement of Information'
annual_report._comment_fee: Fee in USD as a number. 0 if there's no fee but a filing is still required.
annual_report._comment_due: e.g. 'April 15 each year' or 'Within 90 days of formation anniversary'
annual_report._comment_notes: Any important warnings — e.g. late fees, dissolution risk

registered_agent._comment_ra: Almost all states require a registered agent. true/false.
registered_agent._comment_ra_notes: Any state-specific notes — e.g. 'Must have a physical street address (no PO boxes)'

state_tax._comment_tax: Annual minimum state tax/fee in USD. 0 if none. California is $800. Texas is $0 for most small businesses.
state_tax._comment_tax_notes: Important tax notes — this is where CA's $800 minimum, NY's publication cost, etc. go.

sole_proprietorship._comment_dba: true/false — is a DBA required if operating under a name other than your legal name?
sole_proprietorship._comment_dba_loc: e.g. 'County Clerk's office' or 'Secretary of State'

ein._comment: EIN info is the same for all states — this section documents any state-specific nuances

secretary_of_state._comment_sos: Main URL for the Secretary of State's business filing division

_comment_notes: Anything important that founders in this state need to know that doesn't fit the fields above. This is where you put the 'gotchas' — unusual requirements, common mistakes, cost surprises.
_sources: List the URLs you used to verify this information, e.g.:
